flags.title: California residents only
flags.body: COSMOS accepts students completing grades 8–12 who are enrolled in a California high school.

flags.title: $200 deposit non-refundable
flags.body: A $200 deposit is required and is non-refundable, including for students receiving full financial aid.

flags.title: ~4% acceptance rate
flags.body: MIT RSI is among the most selective pre-college programs. Strong math and science preparation is expected.

flags.title: SEVP certification change
flags.body: Verify current visa and international student enrollment status directly with Harvard before applying.

flags.title: Historical abuse allegations
flags.body: Interlochen has faced historical abuse allegations and an external investigation. Review recent safety reporting before enrolling.

flags.title: Mandatory solo wilderness camping
flags.body: Outward Bound courses include a required solo camping component, typically 24–72 hours.

flags.title: Staff compensation note
flags.body: Overland staff historically earn modest seasonal pay ($2,000–3,000/summer), which may affect staff turnover.

flags.title: $550 non-refundable deposit
flags.body: Wake Forest requires a $550 non-refundable deposit in addition to tuition.
flags.sourceCitation: Wake Forest Summer Immersion fee schedule
